# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

apiVersion: k8s.apiflasklabs.com/v1
kind: ApiGateway
metadata:
    name: hello-world
    namespace: gloo-system
spec:
  plugins:
    globalPluginConfigs:
    - name: cors
      plugin:
        configMapRef:
          name: cors
    - name: authn
      plugin:
        configMapRef:
          name: authentication
    - name: rateLimit
      plugin:
        configMapRef: 
          name: rate_limiting
  virtualHost:
    domains: []
    routes:
    - matchers: [Path:/api]
      plugins:
        authn:
          configMapRef: 
            name: authentication # use the config map for Authentication
        cors: {}
      routeAction:
        single:
          destinationSpec:
            httpbin:
              hostname: httpbin.org

The plugin `authn` uses the `authentication` configmap we defined above to configure our service (web app). The plugin `cors` uses the `cors` config map.
